allowedArgs: disk=$(/bin/df -k / | /usr/bin/tail -1 | /usr/bin/tr -s ' ' | /usr/bin/cut -d' ' -f5 | /usr/bin/tr -d '%'); [ -z "$disk" ] && disk=0; cpu=$(/usr/bin/top -l 1 -n 0 | /usr/bin/grep 'CPU usage' | /usr/bin/sed -E 's/.*: ([0-9.]+)% user.*/\1/'); [ -z "$cpu" ] && cpu=0; free=$(/usr/bin/memory_pressure | /usr/bin/grep -i 'free percentage' | /usr/bin/sed -E 's/.*: ([0-9]+)%.*/\1/'); [ -z "$free" ] && free=100; mem=$((100 - free)); echo '{"disk":'$disk',"cpu":'$cpu',"mem":'$mem'}'
